ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "from_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the financial period */,
  "to_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the financial period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial period */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the financial period is open for transactions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the financial period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the financial period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class of share */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class of share (e.g., Equity Share, Preferred Share) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class of share */,
  "par_value" REAL /* The par value of the share class */,
  "dividend_rate" REAL /* The dividend rate for the share class */,
  "voting_rights" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the share class has voting rights */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the share class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the share class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_capital" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of share capital */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of share */,
  "authorized_capital" REAL /* Total capital authorized for the class of share */,
  "issued_capital" REAL /* Capital that has been issued for the class of share */,
  "paid_up_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares that have been paid up */,
  "paid_up_face_value" REAL /* Face value of the paid-up shares */,
  "paid_up_capital" REAL /* Total paid-up capital for the class of share */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* The date when the shares were issued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the share capital data was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the share capital record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the share capital record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the share capital record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_capital_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_capital_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Full name of the shareholder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shareholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the shareholder */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of share held by the shareholder */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the shareholder */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction involving the shareholder */,
  "total_invested" REAL /* Total amount of money invested by the shareholder */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shareholder (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the shareholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the shareholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholders_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder involved in the transaction */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of share involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* The type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale) */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* The number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* The date of the transaction */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* The price per share at the time of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* The total amount of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_transactions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_transactions_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)
